pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 12 and verifier.py line 127 both reference this exact path
setup_task.sh lines 24-45 define data tuples with exactly 4 elements: (Last Name, First Name, Company, Email). verifier.py line 163 checks for col_count == 4.

Task description specifies 'Sort the table data...alphabetically first by Company (Column 3), and then by Last Name (Column 1)'. Data structure: Column 0=Last Name, Column 2=Company. verifier.py lines 49-92 implement exactly this sorting logic.
Task description line states: 'Format the header row (first row) to be Bold with a Light Gray background color'

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a synthetic dataset of 61 rows (1 header + 60 data rows) with 4 columns: Last Name, First Name, Company, and Email. The data is artificially generated with fabricated names and fictional companies (Apex Logistics, TechFlow Solutions, Summit Financial, Global Health Inc., BlueSky Aviation, Omega Structures). The input file is created at /home/ga/Documents/attendee_export_raw.docx with tab-separated text in Portrait orientation. The task requires converting this to a table, applying Landscape orientation, formatting the header row with Bold text and light gray background, and sorting by Company (primary) then Last Name (secondary), saving the result to /home/ga/Documents/check_in_sheet.docx.
